items.title: I Shipped My First Cloudflare Worker via GitHub Actions in 47 Minutes (3 Were Wasted on the Wrong API Token)
items.description: My first Cloudflare Worker deployed in 47 minutes. Three of those were spent staring at this exact error in a red GitHub Actions log: Authentication error [code: 10000]. I had the API token. I had the account ID. I had copy-pasted the workflow from the official docs. It still failed.

items.title: contrast-color()
